mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_ACCOUNT_LOCK WHERE 1=1
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
ORDER BY ACCOUNT_LOCK_IDX DESC

SELECT account_lock_idx, homepage_id, member_id, login_type, count, TO_CHAR(last_fail_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_fail_date, last_fail_ip FROM CMS_ACCOUNT_LOCK WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO CMS_ACCOUNT_LOCK a USING dual ON (a.member_id = #{member_id}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET a.login_type = #{login_type}, a.homepage_id = #{homepage_id}, a.count = a.count + 1, a.last_fail_date = SYSDATE, a.last_fail_ip = #{last_fail_ip} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( account_lock_idx, homepage_id, member_id, login_type, count, last_fail_date, last_fail_ip ) VALUES ( ACCOUNT_LOCK_IDX_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{homepage_id}, #{member_id}, #{login_type}, 1, SYSDATE, #{last_fail_ip} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_ACCOUNT_LOCK WHERE member_id = #{member_id} AND count >= 5 AND (SYSDATE - last_fail_date)*24*60 < 10
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_ACCOUNT_LOCK WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
SELECT NVL(COUNT, 0) FROM CMS_ACCOUNT_LOCK WHERE member_id = #{member_id}
